boonCookieDescription: Earn $1 at end of round. Increases by $2 when a Boss is defeated
boonAllinDescription: Adds X4 Mult on final move of round
boonOffgridDescription: 每次移动结束时，按棋盘格子数增加 <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point>
boonClickbaitDescription: 本次闯关每次刷新商店获得 <multi>+2 Multi</multi>（当前 <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>）
